en_body:
The fire-source of the day star is the sun transformed within each season: sunlight is always splendid and fresh-beautiful as the halo-smile of Joy or the overflowing gaze of Happiness. Summer sunlight, aching and dazzling, belongs to weekends gathering together for merry picnics and barbecues; the world crowds upon beaches to sunbathe or goes boating upon the lake. Spring sunlight is splendid, glorious, the beginning of a cycle welcoming Life bursting into buds after Winter secretly and patiently bears the seeds that patiently wait. Winter sunlight aches with the calling expectation of Spring, nourishing Hope while watching for Spring to come.
 ...But Autumn sunlight is proud yet tender as an innocent virgin: steeped in sweet pure coldness, Autumn sunlight turns upon every yellow, brown, orange, red leaf...Autumn sunlight is crystal-clear and shimmering gold, gentler than silk, glowing with a warmth so delicious and wholesome...The lustrous golden color of sunlight blends smoothly with the gold of gentle Dreaming, reflected upon many-colored leaves turning and turning within that miraculous light of golden Autumn sun...The feeling wrapped inside a honey-sunned Autumn day is the turning that awakens yearning remembrance of the Beloved...Autumn sunlight is gentle as palm held within palm, soft as the eyelashes of the beloved's eyes caressing the promising gaze of Love...Autumn sunlight kisses heaven and earth like the first passionate kiss when the parents of humankind first tasted the emotion of lovers' Love at the beginning of Love's awareness!
 Autumn sunlight becomes a hand holding lightly, enough to silently give Love: greeting Love deepening within the sparkling sun-orb in the fountain-eyes of Love's boat!

Autumn Sunlight Of Golden Silk
 The fire-source of the day star is the sun transformed within each season: sunlight is always splendid and fresh-beautiful as the halo-smile of Joy or the overflowing gaze of Happiness. Summer sunlight, aching and dazzling, belongs to weekends gathering together for merry picnics and barbecues; the world crowds upon beaches to sunbathe or goes boating upon the lake. Spring sunlight is splendid, glorious, the beginning of a cycle welcoming Life bursting into buds after Winter secretly and patiently bears the seeds that patiently wait. Winter sunlight aches with the calling expectation of Spring, nourishing Hope while watching for Spring to come.
 ...But Autumn sunlight is proud yet tender as an innocent virgin: steeped in sweet pure coldness, Autumn sunlight turns upon every yellow, brown, orange, red leaf...Autumn sunlight is crystal-clear and shimmering gold, gentler than silk, glowing with a warmth so delicious and wholesome...The lustrous golden color of sunlight blends smoothly with the gold of gentle Dreaming, reflected upon many-colored leaves turning and turning within that miraculous light of golden Autumn sun...The feeling wrapped inside a honey-sunned Autumn day is the turning that awakens yearning remembrance of the Beloved...Autumn sunlight is gentle as palm held within palm, soft as the eyelashes of the beloved's eyes caressing the promising gaze of Love...Autumn sunlight kisses heaven and earth like the first passionate kiss when the parents of humankind first tasted the emotion of lovers' Love at the beginning of Love's awareness!
 Autumn sunlight becomes a hand holding lightly, enough to silently give Love: greeting Love deepening within the sparkling sun-orb in the fountain-eyes of Love's boat!
note: The “parents of humankind” allude to the first human lovers, blending creation imagery with the poem's mystical celebration of desire.
